caption: Elara, a young literature professor, glides through the frost-kissed campus courtyard, her breath visible in the crisp winter air. Her black body-hugging dress with cutouts catches the soft sunlight, accentuating her curves as she leans over a snow-covered bench, a playful smirk playing on her lips. ✨📚 #UniversityGlam #SexyTeacher #WinterVibes
